name: Goa Local Tourist Regulations
cashCard: Cash is highly preferred at beach shacks and cab drivers; cards and UPI are accepted at formal hotels and restaurants.
dressCodes: No swimwear in towns or cities
Modest dress required inside churches and temples (shoulders and knees covered)
photographyRestrictions: No photography allowed inside church altars or temple sanctums.
alcoholRules: Drinking on beaches is strictly prohibited and subject to fines; permitted only within licensed beach shacks and bars.
localCustoms: Remove footwear before entering temples and some heritage homes
Negotiate cab fares before boarding or use prepaid booths
